'''Kimanan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Orus sector/Legends|Orus sector]] of the [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was where the pets known as [[Furball (creature)|furballs]] came from.<ref name="Stars' End" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places the Orus sector and, consequently, Kimanan, in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
